name: Phytic Acid
description: A gentle chelating AHA found in grains that exfoliates and brightens while binding to metals that trigger melanin.
scientificSummary: Acts as a metal chelator, sequestering iron and copper ions that would otherwise activate tyrosinase and produce melanin.
mechanismOfAction: Chelates pro-oxidant metal ions, inhibits tyrosinase indirectly, and gently exfoliates via AHA-like mechanism.

seo.title: Phytic Acid - Gentle Brightening AHA | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Phytic Acid gently exfoliates and brightens skin by targeting metal-triggered pigmentation.
